display.purpose: Page-level h1 headings. Once per view.

headline.purpose: Section headings, card titles, dialog titles.

title.purpose: Card entity names, product names, list item titles.

body.purpose: Running text, descriptions, product details. Max 75ch.

label.purpose: Badges, button text, table headers, metadata.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Sheets, dropdowns, modals, tooltips — elements that break the page plane.

motion.name: duration-micro
motion.purpose: Standard micro-interaction speed for state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid brand-accent button for the single primary action per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: var(--color-primary, #b32323); color: #fff; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.45rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms ease-in-out; outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { border-color: var(--color-ring, #b32323); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring, #b32323) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Ghost button with border for secondary and grouped actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-foreground, #1a1a1a); font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e5e5e5); border-radius: 0.45rem; cursor: pointer; transition: all 200ms ease-in-out; outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-muted, #f0f0f0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { border-color: var(--color-ring, #b32323); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring, #b32323) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standalone container with soft inner ring boundary. Used for product, blog, and page cards.
components.html:
Card Title
Optional description line.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 0.63rem; background: var(--color-card, #fff); padding: 16px 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-card-foreground, #1a1a1a); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-foreground, #1a1a1a) 10%, transparent); } .ds-card-header { display: grid; gap: 4px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.375; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #666); } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 16px; flex: 1; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--color-border, #e5e5e5); background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-muted, #f0f0f0) 50%, transparent); border-radius: 0 0 0.63rem 0.63rem; gap: 8px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Compact text input with stroke border and brand-colored focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { height: 32px; width: 100%; min-width: 0; border-radius: 0.45rem; border: 1px solid var(--color-input, #e5e5e5); background: transparent; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; color: var(--color-foreground, #1a1a1a); transition: all 200ms ease-in-out; outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #666); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: var(--color-ring, #b32323); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring, #b32323) 50%, transparent); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; cursor: not-allowed; background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-input, #e5e5e5) 50%, transparent); } .ds-label { font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-foreground, #1a1a1a); } @media (min-width: 768px) { .ds-input { font-size: 0.875rem; } }

components.name: Default Badge
components.description: Compact pill-shaped label for categories and statuses.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; gap: 4px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 1.17rem; border: 1px solid transparent; padding: 2px 8px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; background: var(--color-primary, #b32323); color: #fff; transition: all 150ms ease-in-out; }

components.name: Navbar Desktop Link
components.description: Top-level navigation link with icon and label. Hover reveals muted background.
components.html: Home Store
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; font-family: Roboto, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: var(--color-foreground, #1a1a1a); text-decoration: none; border-radius: 0.45rem; transition: background 200ms ease-in-out, color 200ms ease-in-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: var(--color-muted, #f0f0f0); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-ring, #b32323) 50%, transparent); } .ds-nav-link svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Separator
components.description: 1px hairline divider for section and content separation.
components.css: .ds-separator { height: 1px; width: 100%; border: none; margin: 0; background: var(--color-border, #e5e5e5); }

components.name: Skeleton Loader
components.description: Pulsing placeholder shape for loading states.
components.css: @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.5; } } .ds-skeleton { border-radius: 5.8px; background: var(--color-muted, #f0f0f0); animation: ds-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; }

narrative.overview: The interface of a well-run hardware store counter: professional, warm, and direct. Every interaction has purpose — like handing a customer the exact tool they need. The aesthetic is clean without being cold, structured without feeling rigid. This system serves a bilingual (es/en) product catalog, blog, scheduling tool, certificate verification, and AI assistant. It needs to feel trustworthy for commercial transactions while remaining approachable for first-time visitors. The brand voice is that of a knowledgeable shopkeeper, not a corporate website.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral-heavy surfaces with one red accent used sparingly (5–10% of any screen)
Flat by default; depth only for floating elements (sheets, dropdowns, modals)
Solid, tactile components with micro-interactions (1px press on buttons)
Warm-tinted neutrals (oklch hue ~106 — a subtle warmth, not clinical gray)
Dark mode that respects the same palette rules, not inverted
32-swappable brand palettes via data-brand attribute (default is deep red #b32323)

rules.name: The Dynamic Palette Doctrine
rules.body: The brand accent (--brand-9) is never hardcoded. It is resolved at runtime via CSS custom properties driven by a data-brand attribute on <html>. The default is a curated red (#b32323), but 31 Radix UI palettes ship with the codebase.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The brand-9 accent is used on primary interactive elements only: primary buttons, links, focus rings, badges, chart series 1. It must never exceed ~10% of any viewport's surface. Rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Brand-Swappable Rule
rules.body: Every token referencing var(--brand-9) is resolved from the active palette. Do not hardcode hex values for accent roles.

rules.name: The No-Serif Rule
rules.body: Roboto serves every typographic role. Hierarchy comes from weight (700 → 600 → 500 → 400) and scale (≥1.25 ratio), not font switching.

rules.name: The Ring-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Cards, containers, and panels at rest use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 instead of box-shadow. Shadows are reserved exclusively for elements that break the page plane.

dos: Do use ring-1 ring-foreground/10 for card boundaries. No box-shadow on static surfaces.
Do reference var(--brand-9) or semantic aliases for accent roles. Never hardcode a hex for primary, accent, destructive, or ring.
Do use OKLCH for color values. The palette is designed in perceptually-uniform space.
Do keep the brand accent under ~10% of surface area per view. Rarity is the point.
Do use bg-background/95 backdrop-blur for sticky chrome. It needs to feel like glass, not paint.
Do make all interactive elements focus-visible with the 3px brand-9 ring at 50% opacity.
Do use text-base on mobile inputs to prevent iOS zoom.
Do respect the data-brand mechanism. The accent is always swappable.
Do use duration-200 as the standard micro-interaction speed.
Do use font-heading (Roboto) for all titles and font-sans (Roboto) for body.
donts: Don't apply box-shadow to cards. Use ring-1 ring-foreground/10.
Don't hardcode brand colors (#b32323 or any hex) in component files. Always use --brand-9, --primary, or the semantic color token.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism as default, side-stripe borders, or the hero-metric template.
Don't use emojis as UI icons. Use Tabler Icons (SVG, @tabler/icons-react).
Don't override --font-heading with a different font family. Roboto serves all roles.
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use cards inside cards — nesting is always wrong.
Don't animate CSS layout properties (width, height, top, left). Use transform and opacity only.
Don't use #000 or #fff. Tint every neutral toward the brand hue.
Don't disable zoom or use fixed-width containers.
